case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A. VS. VICTOR A BARRAZA ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: RESEARCH TO DETERMINE MILITARY STATUS OF DEFENDANT(S); NOTICE PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 1033(B)(2) (TRANSACTION ID # 74879340) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 74249784) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A. SERVED SEP-05-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BARRAZA, VICTOR A

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARRAZA, VICTOR A $5,817.14 PRINCIPAL, $323.43 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,140.57, SEE SCANNED DOC
